description: 重新啟動 - 復興序幕
kling_prompt: Powerful phoenix-rise shot of dancer rising from lowered position, stretching upward with arms spreading wide. Golden light floods in from behind. Triumphant energy, musical crescendo moment, cinematic rebirth metaphor, 8k.

description: 象徵輪迴 - 無限循環迴圈
kling_prompt: Artistic shot showing dancer rotating in perfect circle, movements repeating cyclically. Camera follows orbital path. Creates hypnotic repeating pattern. Surreal infinite loop quality, meditative contemplative mood, artistic cinematography.

description: 宇宙視角 - 星系出現轉身
kling_prompt: Cosmic wide shot revealing dancer surrounded by swirling galaxy and nebula effects. Stars and cosmic dust orbit around figure. Universe rotating in background. Transcendent spiritual scale, sci-fi mystical blend, 8k cinematic.

description: 原始力量 - 大地之心跳動
kling_prompt: Powerful wide landscape shot showing dancer as center of cosmic heartbeat. Earth pulses with rhythm. Ground glows from within revealing molten cracks. Primal elemental energy, volcanic power, mythic scale cinematography.

description: 多重視角 - 同步多向度舞蹈
kling_prompt: Creative multi-angle split-screen showing dancer performing from 4-6 different simultaneous perspectives. All angles sync and move together. Suggests higher-dimensional impossible choreography. Surreal artistic abstraction, 4K dynamic.

description: 液態光澤 - 流動型光質感
kling_prompt: Creative effect shot where dancer appears to be made of liquid light or molten metal. Body is reflective and fluid, distorting and reforming with each movement. Hyper-realistic special effects, futuristic aesthetic.

description: 交錯鏡像 - 正反相碰撞
kling_prompt: Split-screen artistic shot with normal dancer on left, reversed/mirrored dancer on right, both moving identically but in opposite directions. They approach center point. Perfect bilateral symmetry, surreal visual paradox.

Transitional wide shot of dancer at edge of vast new landscape. Horizon expands. Suggests multiple simultaneous realities or dimensions. Contemplative anticipatory mood, cinematic scope, 8k dreamscape.

description: 光束穿透 - 聖光從天而降
kling_prompt: Dramatic backlit shot with powerful light beams streaming down from sky through atmospheric clouds. Dancer stands in center of light column. Divine illumination, transcendent sacred mood, high-contrast dramatic cinematography.

description: 最終加速 - 音樂衝向高潮
kling_prompt: Energy-building shot showing dancer visibly accelerating to maximum intensity. Movements become blurred and frenzied. Music volume crescendos. Final beat buildup, cinematic action peak, 8k dynamic motion capture.

description: 絕對高潮 - 時空扭曲爆炸
kling_prompt: Ultimate climax shot with extreme visual intensity. Multiple exposure, motion blur, particle explosions, light bursts, and effects converge. Spacetime appears to warp and fracture. Absolute artistic maximum expression, 8k epic finale.

description: 永恆終幕 - 寧靜之後的無限
kling_prompt: Final contemplative shot of dancer standing perfectly still in vast infinite desert under star-filled sky. Complete silence after intensity. Peaceful fade to pure black. Eternal timeless moment, artistic transcendence, cinematic closure, 8k resolution.
